subcodes.first_line: The Cause, once veiled in mystery, hath now been proclaimed; the Hour is nigh, and the Moon hath been cleft asunder [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله العلی المتکبر القاهر. قد جاء امر فی حکم مستتر اقتربت الساعة و انشق القمر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @imagery in the Qur'an, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
